title: Update module github.com/containers/common to v0.55.1
body:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | minor | `v0.54.0` -> `v0.55.1` |

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.55.1`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.55.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.55.0...v0.55.1)

[\[v.0.55\]Bump c/image to v5.26.1](https://togithub.com/containers/common/commit/28321b88bf28799032c74bbdab67888f0f587739)

### [`v0.55.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.55.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.54.0...v0.55.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.26.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1529](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1529)
-   Bump to v0.54.0 and bump c/image to v5.26.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1530](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1530)
-   pkg/servicereaper: build this for FreeBSD as well as Linux by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1531](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1531)
-   Change secrets Replace to modify the ID by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1532](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1532)
-   Relax name length restriction for Secrets/ConfigMaps. by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1528](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1528)
-   Vendor in containers/storage by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1534](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1534)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/common/compare/v0.54.0...v0.55.0

</details>
